title: Mala Chili Oil - Sichuan Style

ingredients.title: Chili Oil Base
items: 1 cup neutral oil (peanut, vegetable, or grapeseed)
1/3 cup Chinese chili flakes (coarse Sichuan-style preferred)

ingredients.title: Optional Enhancers
items: 1 tsp roasted peanuts or fried garlic (garnish)

instruction.title: Toast Sichuan Peppercorns
steps: Lightly toast peppercorns in a dry skillet for 1–2 minutes until aromatic.
Do not burn. Crush lightly using mortar or spice grinder.

instruction.title: Infuse the Oil
steps: Add oil, garlic, ginger, shallots, star anise, cinnamon, bay leaves, and dried chili to a saucepan.
Heat slowly over low-medium heat for 10–15 minutes.
Aromatics should gently sizzle, not burn.

instruction.title: Prepare Chili Mixture
steps: In a heatproof bowl, add chili flakes, crushed peppercorns, sugar, salt, and sesame seeds.

instruction.title: Pour Hot Oil
steps: Carefully pour over chili mixture until it sizzles.

instruction.title: Cool & Store
steps: Rest for 24 hours for best flavor.
Store up to 1 month in refrigerator.

chefTips: Use a mix of coarse and fine chili flakes for depth of heat.
Adjust Sichuan peppercorn quantity for numbing effect.
Fried garlic or shallots increase aroma significantly.
A tiny drizzle of sesame oil enhances fragrance.
